• The randomness generator for events, curses, item spawns, and literary disruptions.

3. Combined Internal Reference (For You & Select Trusted Players)
• A blended document where both student-facing and instructor-only elements exist, but with hidden layers.
• Could be used to manage student-based decision-making (such as allowing student scribes to reference a modified version of the professor’s logs).

📜 2. Macro-Level Organization: Course Structure & RPG Integration

To avoid unnecessary redundancy, we will separate different aspects of the class into categorized sections and interlink them as needed.

✔ Macro Course Overview (Weeks 1-15)
• This will remain purely academic, showing:
• Literary movements, art history, interdisciplinary connections.
• Historical anchors and future echoes.
• Core themes and learning objectives.
• What makes this unique?
